# Plaza Park Salon Suites

> Premium private salon suites for independent beauty professionals in Irving, Texas.

Plaza Park Salon Suites is located at 9425 N MacArthur Blvd, Suite 150, Irving, TX 75063, in the Valley Ranch / Las Colinas corridor. The facility features 40 private suites across 13,000 square feet, with canal views and natural lighting. Established in 2016.

## Key Facts
- 40 private suites
- 15+ independent beauty professionals
- 5.0 stars on Booksy (209+ reviews)
- Move-in ready with appliances included
- 4 weeks free signing bonus for new leases
- 24/7 suite access
- Free parking

## Contact
- Phone: (469) 917-8050
- Email: valleyranchsuitetours@gmail.com
- Property Manager: Brandi Williams

## Services Available
Hair Care, Barber, Skin Care, Lash Extensions, Braiding, Waxing, Makeup, Chiropractor, Massage
